name: How to avoid mistakes after forklift accident on the job?
description: Med first, report, lawyer before adjuster.[2][3]

mainEntity.name: How to avoid mistakes after forklift accident on the job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Med first, report, lawyer before adjuster.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Get treatment, report immediately, no insurance chats alone, lawyer up for value.** Avoid signing releases early.[2] Key factors: Photos/video scene, follow doc orders, track expenses. Don't quit or miss work without note.[3] Preserve all evidence.
